title: SK6 2QE, Pure Clean Waste Solutions Ltd: environmental permit issued – EPR/JP3031CY/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Pure Clean Waste Solutions Ltd Installation name: Bredbury Waste Oil Recovery Facility Permit number: EPR/JP3031CY/V005  "
